scripts.deploy:ftp: npm run build && node scripts/prepare-plugin-deploy.mjs && node scripts/deploy-ftp.mjs
scripts.cap:android: npm run build && npx cap sync android && npx cap open android
scripts.cap:android:build: npm run build && npx cap sync android
scripts.cap:ios: npm run build && npx cap sync ios && npx cap open ios
scripts.cap:ios:build: npm run build && npx cap sync ios
scripts.build:download: npm run cap:android:build && cd android && gradlew.bat assembleDebug && cd .. && node scripts/prepare-download.mjs
